For myeloproliferative disorders, GWAS hits may map to nearby genes; I will query the GWAS Catalog for associations for "Myeloproliferative Disorders" filtered by the candidate genes to see which gene matches reported GWAS signals. genes_list = ["C4orf48","ENSG00000290263","FAM53A","FGFR3","HAUS3","LETM1","MAEA","MXD4","NAT8L","NELFA","NKX1-1","NSD2","POLN","SLBP","TACC3","TMEM129","UVSSA","ZFYVE28"]

result = query_gwas_catalog(prompt=prompt, genes=genes_list, max_results=20)
print("GWAS Catalog query result:")
print(result)
